UDKGame.ini.info: Primary Renegade X game settings. The beginner-friendly parameter boxes write the same common values at startup, and this file remains editable for advanced tuning.

UDKEngine.ini.info: Network, Steam/query, and custom-content download settings.

UDKRenegadeX.ini.info: Renegade X-specific gameplay, voting, bot, RCON, and server-list settings.

UDKWeb.ini.info: Optional Renegade X web server settings. ServerName uses the GSA game-server list name, and ListenPort uses GSA's automatically assigned other port. Leave disabled unless you are intentionally exposing it.

map.name: Starting Map
map.info: Starting map. CNC-Field launches CNC-Field and writes LocalMap=CNC-Field.udk. Use the map name without .udk.

game_class.name: Game Class Override
game_class.info: Normal / map prefix passes no override (none). Survival passes RenX_Coop.Rx_Game_Survival as the game class override.

map_cycle_class.name: Map Cycle Class
map_cycle_class.info: Standard CnC writes Rx_Game into generated map-cycle entries. Survival writes Rx_Game_Survival.

map_rotation.name: Map Rotation
map_rotation.info: Comma-separated map names without .udk. This generates map-cycle entries using the selected Map Cycle Class.

server_payload_urls.name: Server Payload URLs
server_payload_urls.info: Recovery URLs for the 20-map core runtime. The full image normally seeds this runtime without downloading it. If the seed is unavailable, FTP-preloaded matching files are reused before automatic download.

refresh_server_payload.name: Refresh Server Payload
refresh_server_payload.info: Off/false uses the cached runtime in renx-data. On/true redownloads and reinstalls the server payload on next start.

install_optional_map_pack_one.name: Install Optional Map Pack 1
install_optional_map_pack_one.info: On/true downloads 9 maps: City, Crash Site, Daybreak, Desolation, Forest Winter, HeXmountain, Mines, Reservoir Winter, and Tomb. Off/false skips this approximately 616 MiB archive.

install_optional_map_pack_two.name: Install Optional Map Pack 2
install_optional_map_pack_two.info: On/true downloads 9 maps: CliffSide, DarkSide, Eyes, Field 2025, Forest, Hourglass, LakeSide Winter, Outposts, and Reservoir. Off/false skips this approximately 648 MiB archive.

install_optional_map_pack_three.name: Install Optional Map Pack 3
install_optional_map_pack_three.info: On/true downloads 9 maps: Arctic Stronghold, Field Winter, Field X, Snow, Steppe, Toxicity, Tunnels, Uphill, and Walls Winter. Off/false skips this approximately 637 MiB archive.

optional_map_pack_one_url.name: Optional Map Pack 1 URL
optional_map_pack_one_url.info: Public archive URL used when Optional Map Pack 1 is enabled.

optional_map_pack_two_url.name: Optional Map Pack 2 URL
optional_map_pack_two_url.info: Public archive URL used when Optional Map Pack 2 is enabled.

optional_map_pack_three_url.name: Optional Map Pack 3 URL
optional_map_pack_three_url.info: Public archive URL used when Optional Map Pack 3 is enabled.

mutators.name: Mutators
mutators.info: Comma-separated mutator classes. This becomes the launch setting ?mutator=YourMutator. Leave blank for none.

admin_password.name: Admin/RCON Password
admin_password.info: Writes AdminPassword=yourpassword in UDKGame.ini. Leave blank to avoid setting an admin password.

server_password.name: Server Password
server_password.info: Writes GamePassword=yourpassword. Blank means players can join without a server password.

motd.name: Message Of The Day
motd.info: Writes MessageOfTheDay=your message. Some Renegade X builds may not display MOTD reliably.

listed.name: List Server
listed.info: On/true writes bListed=1 so the server can appear in the launcher/server browser. Off/false writes bListed=0.

fixed_map_rotation.name: Fixed Map Rotation
fixed_map_rotation.info: On/true writes bFixedMapRotation=1 to enforce the rotation list. Off/false writes bFixedMapRotation=0 for normal voting.

bots_disabled.name: Disable Bots
bots_disabled.info: On/true writes bBotsDisabled=1 to disable bots. Off/false writes bBotsDisabled=0 to allow bots.

gdi_bots.name: GDI Bot Count
gdi_bots.info: Adds ?GDIBotCount=number to the launch URL. Blank uses the game default.

nod_bots.name: NOD Bot Count
nod_bots.info: Adds ?NODBotCount=number to the launch URL. Blank uses the game default.

gdi_bot_difficulty.name: GDI Bot Difficulty
gdi_bot_difficulty.info: Easy writes GDIDifficulty=0.5, Normal writes 1.0, Hard writes 1.5, and Very Hard writes 2.0.

nod_bot_difficulty.name: NOD Bot Difficulty
nod_bot_difficulty.info: Easy writes NodDifficulty=0.5, Normal writes 1.0, Hard writes 1.5, and Very Hard writes 2.0.

gdi_attack_percent.name: GDI Attack Percent
gdi_attack_percent.info: Defensive writes GDIAttackingValue=25, Balanced writes 50, Aggressive writes 75, and All Attack writes 100.

nod_attack_percent.name: NOD Attack Percent
nod_attack_percent.info: Defensive writes NODAttackingValue=25, Balanced writes 50, Aggressive writes 75, and All Attack writes 100.

allow_downloads.name: Allow Downloads
allow_downloads.info: On/true writes AllowDownloads=1 to allow fallback custom-content downloads. Off/false writes AllowDownloads=0.

redirect_url.name: HTTP Redirect URL
redirect_url.info: Writes RedirectToURL=your URL for fast custom-content downloads. Use a trailing slash.

redirect_use_compression.name: Redirect Uses Compression
redirect_use_compression.info: On/true writes UseCompression=1 for compressed redirect files. Off/false writes UseCompression=0 for normal files.

required_content_urls.name: Required Content URLs
required_content_urls.info: Base game maps are expected to be included in the server payload above. Add separate required map/package URLs only for extra mandatory content. Use semicolon-separated public .zip, .udk, .u, .upk, .ini, or .int URLs; do not use line breaks.

content_urls.name: Custom Content URLs
content_urls.info: Optional extra client-download content. Base maps should already come from the server payload. Use semicolon-separated public .zip, .udk, .u, .upk, .ini, or .int URLs; do not use line breaks.

refresh_content_downloads.name: Refresh Content Downloads
refresh_content_downloads.info: On/true sets RENX_REFRESH_CONTENT_DOWNLOADS=1 to redownload custom content. Off/false sets it to 0 and uses cached files.

web_enabled.name: Enable Web Server
web_enabled.info: On/true writes bEnabled=1 in UDKWeb.ini to enable the optional web server. Off/false writes bEnabled=0.

web_max_connections.name: Web Max Connections
web_max_connections.info: Writes MaxConnections=number in UDKWeb.ini for the optional web server.

enable_rcon.name: Enable RCON
enable_rcon.info: On/true writes bEnableRcon=1. Off/false writes bEnableRcon=0. GSA RCON panel support is still unverified.

max_spectators.name: Max Spectators
max_spectators.info: Writes MaxSpectators=number. Set 0 to effectively disable spectator slots.

admin_can_pause.name: Admins Can Pause
admin_can_pause.info: On/true writes bAdminCanPause=1. Off/false writes bAdminCanPause=0.

force_respawn.name: Force Respawn
force_respawn.info: On/true writes bForceRespawn=1. Off/false writes bForceRespawn=0.

players_must_be_ready.name: Players Must Be Ready
players_must_be_ready.info: On/true writes bPlayersMustBeReady=1. Off/false writes bPlayersMustBeReady=0.

wait_for_net_players.name: Wait For Net Players
wait_for_net_players.info: On/true writes bWaitForNetPlayers=1 and uses Minimum Net Players. Off/false writes bWaitForNetPlayers=0.

net_wait.name: Net Wait Seconds
net_wait.info: Writes NetWait=seconds. This controls how long the game waits during startup or match transition.

min_net_players.name: Minimum Net Players
min_net_players.info: Writes MinNetPlayers=number. Used when Wait For Net Players is enabled.

restart_wait.name: Restart Wait Seconds
restart_wait.info: Writes RestartWait=seconds. This is the in-game match transition delay, not GSA scheduled restarts.

client_processing_timeout.name: Client Processing Timeout
client_processing_timeout.info: Writes ClientProcessingTimeout=seconds for travel/loading timeout behavior.

initial_credits.name: Initial Credits
initial_credits.info: Writes InitialCredits=number for player starting credits where the game mode supports it.

team_mode.name: Team Mode
team_mode.info: All writes TeamMode=All, GDI writes TeamMode=GDI, and Nod writes TeamMode=Nod.

max_map_vote_size.name: Map Vote Size
max_map_vote_size.info: Writes MaxMapVoteSize=number for how many map choices appear in voting.

recent_maps_to_exclude.name: Recent Maps Excluded
recent_maps_to_exclude.info: Writes RecentMapsToExclude=number to keep recently played maps out of the next vote.

spawn_crates.name: Spawn Crates
spawn_crates.info: On/true writes SpawnCrates=1. Off/false writes SpawnCrates=0.

enable_steam.name: Enable Steam
enable_steam.info: On/true writes bEnableSteam=1. Off/false writes bEnableSteam=0.

use_vac.name: Use VAC
use_vac.info: On/true writes bUseVAC=1 where supported by the Renegade X build. Off/false writes bUseVAC=0.

require_steam.name: Require Steam
require_steam.info: On/true writes bRequireSteam=1 in access control. Off/false writes bRequireSteam=0.

steam_auth_admins.name: Steam Auth Admins
steam_auth_admins.info: On/true writes bSteamAuthAdmins=1 where supported. Off/false writes bSteamAuthAdmins=0.

broadcast_admin_identity.name: Broadcast Admin Identity
broadcast_admin_identity.info: On/true writes bBroadcastAdminIdentity=1. Off/false writes bBroadcastAdminIdentity=0.

moderator_password.name: Moderator Password
moderator_password.info: Writes ModPassword=yourpassword under RenX_Game.Rx_AccessControl. Blank disables this password.

multihome.name: Multihome IP
multihome.info: Adds -MULTIHOME=ipaddress to the launch command. Blank lets the server bind normally.

extra_args.name: Extra Launch Args
extra_args.info: Appends raw UDK command-line arguments to the launch command. Blank is safest for normal servers.
